'''thadate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fugitively|fugitively]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-d-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fugitively|fugitively]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thadate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:thadate|thadate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thadatesher|thadatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadatesherĂ«m|thadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thadatero|thadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thadateshĂ«|thadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadateshĂ«m|thadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithadatero|gokithadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithadateshĂ«|gokithadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadateshĂ«m|gokithadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothadankerom|gothadankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothadankeshĂ«|gothadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadankeshĂ«m|gothadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothadankeya|gothadankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thadaterom|thadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadatemu|thadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thadateya|thadateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithadaterom|gokithadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadatemu|gokithadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithadateya|gokithadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:thadadate|thadadate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thadadatesher|thadadatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadadatesherĂ«m|thadadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thadadatero|thadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thadadateshĂ«|thadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadadateshĂ«m|thadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithadadatero|gokithadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithadadateshĂ«|gokithadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadadateshĂ«m|gokithadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothadadankerom|gothadadankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothadadankeshĂ«|gothadadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadadankeshĂ«m|gothadadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothadadankeya|gothadadankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thadadaterom|thadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadadatemu|thadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thadadateya|thadadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithadadaterom|gokithadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadadatemu|gokithadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithadadateya|gokithadadateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:thĂŠdĂŠte|thĂŠdĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thĂŠdĂŠtesher|thĂŠdĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m|thĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠdĂŠtero|thĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|thĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|thĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠdĂŠtero|gokithĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|gokithĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|gokithĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothĂŠdĂŠnkerom|gothĂŠdĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«|gothĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gothĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothĂŠdĂŠnkeya|gothĂŠdĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠdĂŠterom|thĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠdĂŠtemu|thĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thĂŠdĂŠteya|thĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠdĂŠterom|gokithĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠdĂŠtemu|gokithĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithĂŠdĂŠteya|gokithĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:thafdafte|thafdafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thafdaftesher|thafdaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafdaftesherĂ«m|thafdaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafdaftero|thafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thafdafteshĂ«|thafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafdafteshĂ«m|thafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafdaftero|gokithafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithafdafteshĂ«|gokithafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafdafteshĂ«m|gokithafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothafdafnkerom|gothafdafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothafdafnkeshĂ«|gothafdafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothafdafnkeshĂ«m|gothafdafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothafdafnkeya|gothafdafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafdafterom|thafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafdaftemu|thafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thafdafteya|thafdafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafdafterom|gokithafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafdaftemu|gokithafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithafdafteya|gokithafdafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
